@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s final answer is wrong because it filtered 2019 reviews using STRFTIME('%Y', time) on a text timestamp and applied rating >= 4.5 on an integer field in its SQL (WHERE rating >= 4.5 AND STRFTIME('%Y', time) = '2019'), which mis-filtered the data and undercounted high-rating reviews, yielding the wrong top 3 and counts.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@
